headline: Exploring Analyst Estimates for Viatris (VTRS) Q1 Earnings, Beyond Revenue and EPS
summary: Beyond analysts' top-and-bottom-line estimates for Viatris (VTRS), evaluate projections for some of its key metrics to gain a better insight into how the business might have performed for the quarter ended March 2026.

headline: Are Wall Street Analysts Bullish on Viatris Stock?
summary: Despite outperforming the broader market over the past year, Viatris continues to earn a cautiously optimistic outlook from Wall Street.
